visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown checkered shirt and grey trousers, is seen from the side as she reaches out to open the rear door of a red SUV parked on a paved road next to a lush green hillside. (2) The scene cuts to an outdoor street where a person wearing a helmet and black clothing is seen riding a scooter away from the camera. The background shows residential buildings and green trees. (3) The scene shifts to a brightly lit office environment. Four individuals are gathered around a wooden table cluttered with laptops and stationery, actively talking and moving. (4) A person wearing a black hoodie with the yellow hood pulled up is slumped over an office desk, sleeping. Items like a green box, a thermos, and snacks are visible around the workspace. (5) A woman in a light green sleeveless dress walks excitedly into a room with a white marble floor, carrying a large white Prada shopping bag. Behind her is a glass display case filled with toys and collectibles. (6) A woman in a black shirt is seated, holding a yellow cardboard product box that she uses as a makeshift wallet, showing cards and cash inside. (7) A close-up shows a woman's face as she uses chopsticks to eat a large, fresh oyster from its shell. (8) The final scene shows the woman in the office, sitting at a laptop and eating instant noodles directly from a paper packaging bag branded with a cartoon logo.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你以為的老闆出門（外出有專車接送）. (2) [Subtitle]: 實際上（自己騎機車回家）. (3) [Subtitle]: 你以為的老闆上班（事情很多處理不完）. (4) [Subtitle]: 實際上（公司比較好睡）. (5) [Subtitle]: 你以為的老闆消費（名牌 全妝 精緻）. (6) [Subtitle]: 實際上（拿回收盒當錢包）. (7) [Subtitle]: 你以為的老闆伙食（天天吃大餐）. (8) [Subtitle]: 實際上（吃自家的不用花錢）.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 4 office staff members, 1 scooter rider, 1 person sleeping at a desk.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, seen in various outfits including a checkered shirt, a light green dress, and casual office wear.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between an outdoor road with lush greenery, a residential urban street with parked scooters, a bright modern office with wooden desks and laptops, and a studio space with marble floors and display cases.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female vocal chant starts with an energetic and rhythmic cadence, reciting the meme phrase '公主請上車' (Princess, please get in the car). The background features a driving electronic beat with a sharp snare and heavy synthesized bass. (2) The vocal track continues seamlessly as the loop repeats. The mix is bright and clear, dominated by the rhythmic chanting which matches the visual cuts of the video. (3) The lyrics shift slightly to '公主工作請上車' (Princess, go to work, please get in the car), maintaining the high tempo and playful delivery style typical of social media trend audio. (4) The final segment maintains the hyper-energetic tone, with the vocal layers and electronic rhythm sustaining a consistent arousal level until the track abruptly ends at the conclusion of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous comparison format to contrast the perceived glamorous life of a female boss with her mundane and frugal daily reality. It leverages a popular social media meme chant to create a relatable and comedic narrative, while subtly promoting the creator's own food products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is seen eating instant noodles with her own branding, and the Prada bag is used as a contrast prop.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced comedy short using 'Expectation vs. Reality' tropes and meme-style audio to engage the audience.
